summary: All new features tested E2E. Backend: 24/24 pytest tests passed (added 7 new tests for seed data and CSV endpoints). Frontend: all flows verified - login, dashboard shows 24 products/3 low stock, POS shows 24 products, barcode scanner toggle works and adds product via Enter, checkout shows Print Receipt button, Inventory shows 24 rows with Export/Import CSV buttons, CSV export downloads valid file with header + 24 rows, low stock filter shows exactly 3 items (Butter, Granola Bars, Trash Bags).

minor.issue: No max row limit - to_list(10000) caps at 10k products but not paginated. Acceptable for current scale.
Checks filename.endswith('.csv') only - no content-type validation. Could be tightened.
File size now 957 lines (>700 line guideline). Consider splitting into modules (auth/products/sales/reports).

issues: Recharts: width(-1)/height(-1) warnings persist when no sales data - add minHeight to ResponsiveContainer parent
printReceipt uses window.open popup - may be blocked by browser popup blockers. Consider inline receipt modal or Blob download fallback.

action_items: (Optional) Add minHeight to Recharts ResponsiveContainer parents
(Optional) Consider popup-blocker fallback for print receipt
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 957 lines - exceeds 700 line guideline. Split into auth.py, products.py, sales.py, reports.py, csv_handlers.py.
CSV import endpoint trusts SKU to detect update - if CSV has duplicate SKUs within same file, later rows overwrite earlier ones silently.
CSV export returns all products without pagination or date filter - fine for 24 products but scale risk at 10k+.
Barcode scanner uses global keydown listener (window.addEventListener) - may conflict if other pages/modals are open; scoped listener would be safer.
Previous iteration findings still valid: CORS wildcard with credentials, unauthenticated /api/auth/register accepting 'admin' role.
seed_data_creation: CSV import test created and cleaned up TESTCSV_<timestamp> product. 24 seed products from startup_event persist in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py has 24 tests covering auth, products CRUD, suppliers, employees, categories, reports, sales, seed data (24 products, 3 low stock), CSV export/import (create/update/reject non-csv). Frontend verified: barcode scanner (toggle + Enter key scan of 1000000001 adds GRO-001), Print Receipt button in success dialog (uses window.open), CSV Export download returns text/csv with 25 lines, Low stock filter works. Expected low-stock items: Butter 250g (DAI-004, 8/15), Granola Bars 6-pack (SNK-004, 5/15), Trash Bags 30-count (HOU-003, 3/10).
rca of the issue: N/A - all features work as specified
